mapper.sql: CASE r.status WHEN 1 THEN '宸插垱寤? WHEN 2 THEN '宸茬‘璁? WHEN 3 THEN '宸插彇娑? WHEN 4 THEN '宸插叆浣? WHEN 5 THEN '宸插畬鎴? ELSE '鏈煡鐘舵€? END
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, CAST(r.reservation_id AS CHAR) AS orderNo, r.guest_id AS guestId, r.hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, h.phone AS hotelPhone, h.province AS province, h.city AS city, h.district AS district, h.address AS address, CONCAT_WS('', NULLIF(h.province, ''), NULLIF(h.city, ''), NULLIF(h.district, ''), NULLIF(h.address, '')) AS hotelFullAddress, r.type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.type_name AS roomTypeName, r.check_in_date AS checkInDate, r.check_out_date AS checkOutDate, r.room_count AS roomCount, r.total_price AS totalPrice, r.status AS status, AS statusDescription, r.create_time AS createdAt FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN hotel h ON h.hotel_id = r.hotel_id LEFT JOIN room_type rt ON rt.type_id = r.type_id WHERE r.guest_id = #{guestId} AND r.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, CAST(r.reservation_id AS CHAR) AS orderNo, r.guest_id AS guestId, r.hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, h.phone AS hotelPhone, h.province AS province, h.city AS city, h.district AS district, h.address AS address, CONCAT_WS('', NULLIF(h.province, ''), NULLIF(h.city, ''), NULLIF(h.district, ''), NULLIF(h.address, '')) AS hotelFullAddress, r.type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.type_name AS roomTypeName, r.check_in_date AS checkInDate, r.check_out_date AS checkOutDate, r.room_count AS roomCount, r.total_price AS totalPrice, r.status AS status, AS statusDescription, r.create_time AS createdAt FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN hotel h ON h.hotel_id = r.hotel_id LEFT JOIN room_type rt ON rt.type_id = r.type_id WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.guest_id = #{guestId}
AND r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
AND r.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{recentDays} DAY)
AND h.province LIKE CONCAT('%', #{province}, '%')
AND h.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%')
AND ( h.district LIKE CONCAT('%', #{district}, '%') OR h.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{district}, '%') )
AND h.hotel_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{hotelName}, '%')
AND r.type_id = #{roomTypeId}
AND rt.type_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roomTypeKeyword}, '%')
AND r.status IN (1, 2)
AND r.status = 3
AND r.status = 4
AND r.status = 5
ORDER BY
r.check_in_date ASC, r.create_time DESC
r.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, CAST(r.reservation_id AS CHAR) AS orderNo, r.guest_id AS guestId, r.hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, h.phone AS hotelPhone, h.address AS hotelAddress, CONCAT_WS('', NULLIF(h.province, ''), NULLIF(h.city, ''), NULLIF(h.district, ''), NULLIF(h.address, '')) AS hotelFullAddress, r.type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.type_name AS roomTypeName, r.check_in_date AS checkInDate, r.check_out_date AS checkOutDate, r.room_count AS roomCount, r.total_price AS totalPrice, r.status AS status, AS statusDescription, r.create_time AS createdAt, g.name AS contactName, g.phone AS contactPhone FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN hotel h ON h.hotel_id = r.hotel_id LEFT JOIN room_type rt ON rt.type_id = r.type_id LEFT JOIN guest g ON g.guest_id = r.guest_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND r.is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT rt.type_id FROM room_type rt WHERE rt.hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND rt.type_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN rt.type_name = #{keyword} THEN 1 WHEN rt.type_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, rt.price ASC, rt.type_id ASC LIMIT 1
